value.heading: We are Soup House
value.intro: Soup House is where all of Saint Louis can have dinner together. We cook for our neighbors and organizational partners, all towards the goal of finding a gathering place of our own where there's always good, free food that everyone can enjoy together.

value.heading: To show what's possible when neighbors feed each other.
What We Do
value.subheading: Our work comes in three flavors:

items.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 2v7c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h4a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V2"/><path d="M7 2v20"/><path d="M21 15V2a5 5 0 0 0-5 5v6c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h3Zm0 0v7"/></svg>
items.title: Community Meals
items.body: We host our own meals and events around St. Louis. Grab a plate and take a seat!

items.title: Partner Support
items.body: We back folks already doing good work across the city -- helping out with food and logistics at their gatherings.

items.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="32" height="32" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M15 21v-8a1 1 0 0 0-1-1h-4a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v8"/><path d="M3 10a2 2 0 0 1 .709-1.528l7-6a2 2 0 0 1 2.582 0l7 6A2 2 0 0 1 21 10v9a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/></svg>
items.title: A Gathering Place
items.body: We're working toward a permanent kitchen and gathering space where good food is always available.

value.heading: Community Calendar
value.subheading: We're working on a calendar of events in St. Louis with free food. Take a look, or visit the full calendar and submit your own event!
value.presetTags: meal, distribution, art, volunteer, vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free

value.heading: Latest News
value.subheading: The latest bits of news from ourselves and our partners:

value.heading: Help us cook for the neighborhood!
value.body: We need all sorts of volunteers! Wherever you come from and whatever you know, we're always happy to have more hands at the table.
